nasb.text: Now Zedekiah the son of Josiah whom Nebuchadnezzar king of Babylon had made king in the land of Judah, reigned as king in place of Coniah the son of Jehoiakim.

esv.text: Zedekiah the son of Josiah, whom Nebuchadnezzar king of Babylon made king in the land of Judah, reigned instead of Coniah the son of Jehoiakim.

cnv.text: 約西亞的兒子西底家代替約雅敬的兒子哥尼雅作王；西底家是巴比倫王尼布甲尼撒所立在猶大地作王的。

ccb.text: 巴比伦王尼布甲尼撒立约西亚的儿子西底迦代替约雅敬的儿子哥尼雅做犹大王。
